title: cryanthemum scharnhorstii
intro: Cryanthemum scharnhorstii, also known as the Scharnhorst's daisy or Yellow-flowered Chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone content. The health benefits of Cryanthemum scharnhorstii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. Cryanthemum scharnhorstii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestive health and relieve respiratory issues.
